about.label: 01 — About
about.title:
I build things
for the web.
about.p1: Full-stack developer with 25+ years of experience in advertising and digital marketing agencies. Focused on complex, scalable web applications.
about.p2: I combine technical development with 3D, motion graphics and design — allowing me to approach projects from multiple creative and technical angles.
about.p3: I've worked with brands like {brands}, delivering solutions that balance performance, design and real-world functionality.
